preferred.activity_discovery_motivation: turn sudden 60-120 minute free slots into meaningful solo experiences
core_attraction: clear time, location, price, and remaining spots
recommendations feel personally relevant instead of generic trending picks
core_objections: actual experience may not match the listing
refund or reschedule may be painful
the app may only be a prettier directory without reducing decision effort
questions_to_surface: What can I actually still book after 7pm nearby?
Do I need to prepare anything before going?
What happens if I need to reschedule after paying?
Are recommendations based on my behavior or just popularity?
preferred.recommendation_reaction_bias: cares about relevance and serendipity more than group coordination
preferred.retention_hypothesis: will only retain if it repeatedly turns small empty slots into low-friction satisfying experiences
